warm_up: Review top error from last session: gender.
focus: Masculine accusative articles: drill the pattern 'der → einen' with common masculine café and restaurant nouns (der Kaffee → einen Kaffee, der Cappuccino → einen Cappuccino, der Kuchen → einen Kuchen) until it becomes automatic.
speaking_prompt: You're standing in front of a famous painting at the Kunsthistorisches Museum. Dr. Huber approaches and offers to tell you about it. Ask follow-up questions — who painted it, when, and what it means.
